import torch
from model import MathExprRecognizer, get_transform
from train import MathDataset
import os
from PIL import Image

data_dir = "/data"
device = torch.device('cuda' if torch.cuda.is_available() else 'cpu')
dataset = MathDataset(split="val", data_dir=data_dir)
vocab = dataset.vocab
print("Vocab size:", len(vocab))
model = MathExprRecognizer(len(vocab), 256, 1).to(device)
state_dict = torch.load("checkpoints/best.pt", map_location=device, weights_only=True)
model.load_state_dict(state_dict)
model.eval()
transform = get_transform()
print("Sample predictions:")
for i in range(5):
    id_, token_ids = dataset.samples[i]
    gt_latex = " ".join(vocab[t] for t in token_ids)
    img_path = os.path.join(data_dir, "val", "images", f"{id_}.png")
    image = Image.open(img_path).convert("L")
    image_tensor = transform(image).unsqueeze(0).to(device)
    with torch.no_grad():
        seq_ids_list = model.generate(image_tensor, max_len=150)[0]
    pred_latex = " ".join([vocab[s] for s in seq_ids_list]) if seq_ids_list else "<empty>"
    print(f"ID: {id_}")
    print(f"GT: {gt_latex}")
    print(f"Pred: {pred_latex}")
    print("---")
print("Debug completed.")
